mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follow (follower_id, following_id, created_at) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.signature, uf.created_at AS createdAt FROM user_follow uf LEFT JOIN user u ON uf.following_id = u.user_id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.signature, uf.created_at AS createdAt FROM user_follow uf LEFT JOIN user u ON uf.follower_id = u.user_id WHERE uf.following_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC
